title: A Frail Whisper

sections.label: Intro
lines: A whisper of breath, a fleeting life,
Dust on the wind, frail, yet alight,
Our days are numbered, shadows fall,
Yet still Your mercy cradles all.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Bless the Lord, my soul, arise,
Though despair consumes the skies,
Forget not the love that heals,
Wounds of time, Your grace reveals.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: As the heavens stretch above,
So is Your boundless love.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: From the dust, You raise my song,
Through the storm, You carry on,
Mercy vast as endless skies,
Hope reborn where sorrow lies.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A flower blooms, a moment brief,
Swept away like autumn leaves,
Yet eternal, Your throne remains,
A refuge through the ceaseless rains.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: As the heavens stretch above,
So is Your boundless love.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: From the dust, You raise my song,
Through the storm, You carry on,
Mercy vast as endless skies,
Hope reborn where sorrow lies.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Oh, we are frail, a fleeting breath,
Yet in Your arms, no fear of death,
A covenant, steadfast and pure,
Through generations, You endure.

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: From the dust, You raise my song,
Through the storm, You carry on,
Mercy vast as endless skies,
Hope reborn where sorrow lies.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Bless the Lord, my soul, arise,
Though despair consumes the skies.

epigraph: and forget not all his benefits
styleNote: Distant Whispers Of Guitar · Soft Percussion Enters · With Heightened Intensity
